name: Adversea
description: Full Adversea integration covering all documented screening, entity recognition, and account endpoints.

entrypoints.name: PEP & Sanctions Check
entrypoints.description: Checks PEP exposure and active sanctions datasets for the target name.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Full name of the person or organization to screen.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Topic Report
entrypoints.description: Adverse media analysis grouped by risk topics.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Full name of the person or organization to screen.

inputs.name: output_language
inputs.title: Output Language
inputs.description: Language for generated text output.

inputs.name: country
inputs.title: Country
inputs.description: Adversea country code (for example slovakia, germany, usa).

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Social Media
entrypoints.description: Finds public social media profiles matching the target name.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Full name of the person or organization to screen.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Unit Analysis (Text)
entrypoints.description: Analyzes search engine results and returns concise textual findings for each URL.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of the screened person or company.

inputs.name: output_language
inputs.title: Output Language
inputs.description: Language for generated text.

inputs.name: country
inputs.title: Country
inputs.description: Optional Adversea country code for regional tuning.

inputs.name: media_only
inputs.title: Media Only
inputs.description: Restrict analysis to internet media.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Unit Analysis (Claims)
entrypoints.description: Analyzes search engine results and returns atomic claims for each URL.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of the screened person or company.

inputs.name: output_language
inputs.title: Output Language
inputs.description: Language for generated claims.

inputs.name: country
inputs.title: Country
inputs.description: Optional Adversea country code for regional tuning.

inputs.name: media_only
inputs.title: Media Only
inputs.description: Restrict analysis to internet media.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: RPO Organization Search
entrypoints.description: Finds Slovak organizations and related registry context in RPO/ORSR.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of person or company to search in RPO.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: RPO Business Subjects
entrypoints.description: Retrieves business subjects for a Slovak organization ICO.

inputs.name: ico
inputs.title: ICO
inputs.description: Organization ICO (numeric).

entrypoints.name: Debtors Check
entrypoints.description: Checks publicly available debtor registries for the target.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of person or company to screen in debtor lists.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Court Case Detail
entrypoints.description: Loads one court case detail by court case link and organization ICO.

inputs.name: court_case_link
inputs.title: Court Case Link
inputs.description: Unique URL/link to the court case document.

inputs.name: org_ico
inputs.title: Organization ICO
inputs.description: 8-digit organization ICO tied to this case.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Default Entity Recognition
entrypoints.description: Extracts entities from search results for the target name.

inputs.name: target
inputs.title: Target Name
inputs.description: Name of person or company for entity extraction.

inputs.name: output_language
inputs.title: Output Language
inputs.description: Language for generated output.

inputs.name: country
inputs.title: Country
inputs.description: Optional Adversea country code for regional tuning.

inputs.name: force_recreate
inputs.title: Force Recreate
inputs.description: Bypass cache and refresh all response parts.

entrypoints.name: Remaining Credit
entrypoints.description: Retrieves remaining Adversea credit for the current API key.

metrics.name: remaining_credit
metrics.title: Remaining Credit
metrics.description: Current Adversea account credit in EUR, refreshed on each plugin run.
